name: AACT Data Quality and AI Insights Dashboard
description: Tracks AACT Bronze, Silver, and Gold quality trends and surfaces the latest AI-generated insight.

widgets.title: Overall Quality Score — Latest Run
widgets.query: SELECT ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS quality_score_pct FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics)

widgets.title: Failed Checks — Latest Run
widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_checks FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE passed = false AND run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics)

widgets.title: Quality Score Trend by Layer
widgets.query: SELECT DATE(run_timestamp) AS run_date, layer, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS quality_score_pct FROM dq_project.quality_metrics GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

widgets.title: Latest Quality Score by Table
widgets.query: SELECT table_name, ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN passed THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) * 100, 1) AS quality_score_pct FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics) GROUP BY table_name ORDER BY quality_score_pct ASC, table_name

widgets.title: Failing Checks — Latest Run
widgets.query: SELECT layer, table_name, check_name, column_name, metric_value, threshold, details FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE passed = false AND run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics) ORDER BY layer, table_name, check_name, column_name

widgets.title: Referential Integrity Failures
widgets.query: SELECT layer, table_name, column_name, metric_value AS orphan_rate, details FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE check_name = 'referential_integrity' AND metric_value > 0 ORDER BY run_timestamp DESC, layer, table_name

widgets.title: Null Rate Hotspots — Latest Run
widgets.query: SELECT CONCAT(layer, ' | ', column_name) AS layer_column, metric_value AS null_rate FROM dq_project.quality_metrics WHERE check_name = 'null_rate' AND run_timestamp = (SELECT MAX(run_timestamp) FROM dq_project.quality_metrics) ORDER BY null_rate DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Latest AI Insight
widgets.query: SELECT run_timestamp, metrics_run_timestamp, severity, failed_check_count, passed_check_count, summary, root_cause, suggested_action FROM dq_project.ai_insights ORDER BY run_timestamp DESC LIMIT 1

widgets.title: AI Severity Trend
widgets.query: SELECT DATE(run_timestamp) AS run_date, severity, COUNT(*) AS insight_count FROM dq_project.ai_insights GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2
